name: Meet Zesty — Hero Product Shot
usage: The centerpiece of the 'Meet Zesty' section. Displayed large (up to 384px wide, 480px tall) floating in the center of a sand-colored (#F5EDE0) section with text descriptions positioned on either side. This is THE money shot of the entire page — it needs to communicate premium quality, innovation (the cap), and natural ingredients all at once. The floating ingredients around the bottle create visual interest and tell the ingredient story.
prompt: Premium studio product photograph of a single zesty supplement shot bottle at a slight 15-degree angle, appearing to float in mid-air against a clean warm sand background. The cap is partially twisted open, revealing the white creatine powder compartment inside. Scattered around the bottle in mid-air: a thin slice of fresh ginger root, a piece of snapped turmeric showing the vivid orange interior, a lemon wedge, four or five whole black peppercorns, and a small cloud of fine white creatine powder. The thick opaque golden-yellow liquid inside the bottle has a rich turmeric-ginger color, dense and not see-through. Every element is tack-sharp. The composition is balanced — bottle centered with ingredients orbiting naturally around it. Clean bright studio lighting with a subtle warm cast. Style is premium product photography meeting an ingredient explosion — Aesop meets Ottolenghi.

scene.background: solid warm sand tone (#F5EDE0), clean and uniform
scene.surface: none, everything floats with drop shadows

subject.description: zesty shot bottle with partially open cap revealing creatine powder, surrounded by floating fresh ingredients: ginger slice, turmeric piece, lemon wedge, black peppercorns, white powder particles
subject.position: bottle centered, ingredients orbiting around it in a natural scattered arrangement

camera.depth_of_field: deep, all elements in sharp focus

lighting.type: studio softbox with warm gel, bright and even
lighting.direction: front-angled from upper left, secondary fill from right
lighting.shadows: soft diffused drop shadows on all floating elements

style: premium product photography, ingredient explosion, Aesop meets Ottolenghi, every detail razor-sharp
negative: no background texture, no gradient, no humans, no text overlays, no watermarks, no blur, no messy/chaotic arrangement, no green background
